descriptionShort: WHL game footage from January 1986 showing a melee between Medicine Hat Tigers and Lethbridge Broncos, featuring Troy Gamble and Matt Hervey.
descriptionLong: This archival WHL footage captures a confrontation during a January 1986 game between the Medicine Hat Tigers and Lethbridge Broncos. The clip focuses on an on-ice altercation involving players Troy Gamble and Matt Hervey. Note: This predates the Richmond Sockeyes' founding (1986-87 season) and may document early playing-era context for alumni involved in the 1987 Centennial Cup team.
